case_title: OLIVIA TREJO VS. SUPERIOR PLUMBING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TREJO, OLIVIA AS TO DEFENDANT SUPERIOR PLUMBING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MIGUEL GUCHO, EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SUPERIOR PLUMBING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GABRIEL GUCHO, EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SUPERIOR PLUMBING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TREJO, OLIVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUPERIOR PLUMBING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MIGUEL GUCHO, EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SUPERIOR PLUMBING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GABRIEL GUCHO, EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF SUPERIOR PLUMBING, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $3,306.36 PRINCIPAL, $8.41 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,539.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
